import re, unicodedata, math, numpy as np, pandas as pd

def normalize_ar(s):
    if not isinstance(s, str):
        return ""
    # remove tashkeel
    # Arabic diacritics range
    s2 = ''.join(ch for ch in s if unicodedata.category(ch) != 'Mn')
    # remove tatweel
    s2 = s2.replace('ـ','')
    # unify hamza forms
    s2 = s2.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا')
    s2 = s2.replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ء','')
    # normalize taa marbuta to ha? maybe leave
    s2 = s2.replace('ة','ه')
    # normalize yaa alef maqsoora
    s2 = s2.replace('ى','ي')
    # remove punctuation and latin
    s2 = re.sub(r'[^\u0621-\u063A\u0641-\u064A\s]', ' ', s2)
    s2 = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s2).strip()
    return s2
